- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. Created the file with initial content.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements - Requirements already specified by user.

- [x] Scaffold the Project - Ran npx create-vite@latest . --template react-ts to create the project structure.

- [x] Customize the Project - Installed and configured Tailwind CSS, shadcn/ui, i18n, auth context, theme provider, language context, created Login and Dashboard components with API integration.

- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions required for this project.

- [x] Compile the Project - Project builds successfully without errors.

- [x] Create and Run Task - No task required, npm run dev is available.

- [x] Launch the Project - Development server started on http://localhost:5174/.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete - Updated README.md and cleaned up copilot-instructions.md.
